description:
This conceptual diagram illustrates the time series data update strategy for L2a products, showing four sequential stages of data integration. Each sub-plot features an X-axis representing time and a Y-axis representing an unspecified measurement (likely displacement values from InSAR data), with a red dashed vertical line marking the year 2020.
(a) Represents the "baseline" time series, depicted by blue triangles, showing a generally declining trend up to the year 2020.
(b) Represents the "updated" time series, depicted by blue circles, showing a similar declining trend. This new series starts before the 2020 marker, indicating an overlapping window with the baseline data, and extends beyond 2020.
(c) Shows the initial combination of the baseline and updated time series. The blue triangles represent the original data points from the baseline, and the blue circles represent the new data points. In the overlapping period around 2020, both triangles and circles are present, illustrating the raw addition of new data to the existing series.
(d) Depicts the final smoothed and integrated time series. The baseline data (triangles) are combined with the updated data (circles). A green line represents the smoothed time series, demonstrating a "smoother conjunction" of the baseline and updated data, particularly in the overlapping period around 2020, where samples from 2020 to 2021 are added and integrated with the frozen displacement values from the baseline up to 2020.
